title: Beta
content:
Beta

While in a relationship, I read online: ‘Sexually incompatible people should not be in a relationship together.’ The noise does not penetrate; not then, it washes over and settles into the sediment only after the fracturing of the aforementioned bond.

After a relationship, I read online: ‘Sexually incompatible people should not be in a relationship together.’ See now that makes sense.

thankyouthankyouthankyouthankyouthankyouthankyou
mymistress

Is lying an invention of contemporary society?
Are you a Jew? Asks a Nazi.
No, says a Jew.

My secret sexual deviances,
The emotional weight of hiding translates directly to physical mass,
Drug abuse.

What am I compulsively hiding and compulsively whittling away towards my fears of inner darkness. I fear attraction equals reality. Or complicitness.

I fear I’m damaging my brain intentionally filling dulling senses until I’m dulled from life permanently
